action_items.task: Database migration cleanup and API endpoints for activity feed
Frontend work on dashboard redesign, including new components and Firebase integration
Build notification service with RabbitMQ for queuing messages to be sent through Firebase Cloud Messaging
Write load tests and end-to-end tests for rate limiting feature, including Redis failure scenarios
Integrate Firebase Cloud Messaging with the frontend dashboard design
Set up mock Firebase service for testing push notification system integration and end-to-end tests

decisions.decision: Prioritize database migration cleanup at the start of the sprint.
Use Redis with a token bucket algorithm for rate limiting feature implementation.
Implement push notification system using Firebase Cloud Messaging, queued through RabbitMQ on the backend and integrated into the frontend dashboard design.
Schedule a mid-sprint review to check progress on all three features

key_discussion_points.topic: Database migration cleanup and API endpoints for activity feed.
key_discussion_points.summary: Carol will handle the database scripts, focusing firstly on edge cases with pre-2024 account data.
Frontend work to be led by Dave and includes new components as well as Firebase integration. Priority given due to design approvals already in place for wireframes.

key_discussion_points.topic: API rate limiting feature implementation approach.
key_discussion_points.summary: Bob proposes a token bucket algorithm with Redis, allowing burst traffic up to 2x the normal rate within a short window. Decision made during sprint planning meeting.

A new feature requested by users for important event notifications will be implemented using Firebase Cloud Messaging, with backend queueing through RabbitMQ and frontend integration led by Dave. Tests to cover end-to-end flow.

participant_contributions.name: Alice
participant_contributions.contributions: Led the sprint planning meeting, summarized decisions and action items for clarity.

participant_contributions.name: Bob
participant_contributions.contributions: Flagged technical debt from last sprint; proposed rate limiting solution with Redis. Advocated for a mid-sprint review to monitor progress.
Responsible for database migration scripts and API endpoints, with special attention given to pre-2024 account data edge cases.

participant_contributions.name: Dave
participant_contributions.contributions: Completed wireframes; led the discussion on dashboard redesign and will handle frontend integration for Firebase Cloud Messaging notifications.

participant_contributions.name: Eve
participant_contributions.contributions: Proposed load tests to verify rate limiting feature; set up mock Firebase service for testing push notification system end-to-end flow. Agreed on mid-sprint review.
